name: generate_scene
description: Generate Danbooru-style tags describing an anime scene for NovelAI image generation.

environment.description: Danbooru-style tags for the physical setting. Decompose into individual tags for location, architecture, objects, materials, and lighting. E.g. 'indoors, library, victorian, bookshelf, fireplace, stained glass window, dim lighting', 'outdoors, city alley, rain, wet ground, neon sign, narrow street'

weather.description: Concise atmosphere/weather tags. E.g. 'rain, fog', 'overcast, wet ground', 'snow, breath visible', 'clear, sunbeam'

mood.description: One or two mood tags. E.g. 'melancholic', 'tense, foreboding', 'warm, cozy', 'eerie'

focal_detail.description: 2-5 descriptive tags for the single most important visual element. E.g. 'stone torii gate, overgrown, vines, moss', 'lantern, glowing, reflection, puddle'

palette_override.description: Optional. Color/theme tags if mood won't naturally imply the right colors. E.g. 'warm colors, orange theme, golden lighting', 'desaturated, blue theme, moonlight'
